title: Weather: Windy with rough seas warning
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South African Weather Service has advised that it will be partly cloudy and cool over the southern and eastern parts of the country, with isolated showers. Otherwise, fine and warm.

Damaging winds and waves are expected along the east and south coast of the country.

A yellow level 2 warning has been issued for rough seas leading to difficulty in navigation at sea and small vessels at risk of taking on water and capsizing in a locality, are expected between Cape Point and Plettenberg Bay until Wednesday afternoon.


> Regional weather forecast:


Western CapeCloudy over the southern and south-western parts, otherwise fine and partly cloudy and cold to cool. The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh southerly to south-westerly, becoming light from the west.

The expected UVB sunburn index: Moderate

Western half of the Eastern CapePartly cloudy and cool, becoming fine in the north by the afternoon. The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh south-westerly.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeMorning fog patches in the north-east where it will be cloudy, otherwise partly cloudy and cool along the coast, becoming fine in the north by the afternoon. The wind along the coast will be moderate south-westerly.


> Extended forecast


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
